constraints.note: All skeletons are slot-level. They reference component types and PortRole IDs; they do not instantiate concrete component instances.

skeletons.title: Utility Chassis (Fixed Displacement Pump + Open-Center 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

connections.note: Relief valve taps the main pressure line

notes: DCV center condition is intended as open-center for low-cost open-circuit systems.
If your downstream pipeline requires a junction/net node for multi-branch on pressure line, insert an implicit NET node at PUMP.P.

skeletons.title: Efficient Open Circuit (Variable Pump + Closed-Center 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)
notes: DCV center condition is intended as closed-center to allow pump destroking/standby in neutral (conceptual; valve variant selected at instantiation).
This template is recommended when energy efficiency and thermal management are priorities.

skeletons.title: Rotary Drive (Fixed Pump + 4/3 DCV + Hydraulic Motor)
notes: Motor ports A/B represent the two motor work ports; direction is determined by which port is pressurized.

skeletons.title: Accumulator-Assisted Supply (Variable Pump + Check Valve + Bladder Accumulator + DCV + Cylinder)

connections.note: Charge line to accumulator via check valve

notes: Accumulator port P is connected to the pressure bus; in this 11-type scope, explicit unloading/dump valves are not represented.
For strict graph constraints (one edge per port), insert an implicit NET node at CV_ACC.OUT.

skeletons.title: Redundant/Stepwise Supply (Two Constant Pumps + Isolation Check Valves + DCV + Cylinder)
notes: Check valves prevent backflow between parallel pump branches.
To model staged activation (Pump2 assists only at high demand), control logic is handled outside the hydraulic topology.

skeletons.title: Closed System (Reversible Pump-Controlled Cylinder, No Tank Shown; Cross-Port Relief Protection)

componentSlots.name: Reversible Variable Displacement Pump (Closed Circuit Ports)

connections.note: Relief discharges into opposite line B (no tank shown)
Relief discharges into opposite line A (no tank shown)

notes: This template models a closed-circuit pump-controlled cylinder drive as shown in typical 'closed system / pump-controlled system' schematics: main loop is Pump(A/B) ↔ Cylinder(A/B); no tank is drawn at system boundary.
Cross-port relief valves protect the loop against pressure peaks: PRV_A2B opens A→B; PRV_B2A opens B→A.
In real systems, charge/flush/case-drain oil management usually exists but is considered inside the power unit boundary here and not explicitly modeled in the 11-type skeleton library.
If your downstream pipeline requires explicit junction/net nodes for multi-branch on PUMP.A/PUMP.B, insert implicit NET nodes.

qaTree.description: Two-stage QA decision tree. Stage 1 selects a skeleton template from free-text input. Stage 2 collects only sizing constraints and system inputs needed for component selection.

skeleton1_utility_chassis_fixed_pump_ope.title: Utility Chassis (Fixed Displacement Pump + Open-Center 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton2_variable_pump_closed_center_dc.title: Efficient Open Circuit (Variable Pump + Closed-Center 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton3_fixed_pump_dcv_hydraulic_motor.title: Rotary Drive (Fixed Pump + 4/3 DCV + Hydraulic Motor)

skeleton4_variable_pump_check_accumulato.title: Accumulator-Assisted Supply (Variable Pump + Check Valve + Bladder Accumulator + DCV + Cylinder)

skeleton5_parallel_constant_pumps_with_i.title: Redundant/Stepwise Supply (Two Constant Pumps + Isolation Check Valves + DCV + Cylinder)

skeleton6_closed_circuit_pump_controlled.title: Closed System (Reversible Pump-Controlled Cylinder, No Tank Shown; Cross-Port Relief Protection)

normalization.units: SI preferred; accept common engineering units and convert in post-processing if required.
normalization.boolean: Accept yes/no, true/false, required/not required, as well as domain phrases.

stage1.goal: Select exactly one skeletonId from the 6-template library.

nodes.prompt: Describe the main motion you need (linear cylinder or rotary motor).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Do you mean a hydraulic cylinder (linear motion) or a hydraulic motor (rotary motion)? Please describe briefly.

nodes.prompt: Do you prefer pump-controlled motion (pump directly drives the cylinder chambers) or valve-controlled motion (4/3 directional valve)?

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Should the pump directly control cylinder motion (closed circuit) or use a 4/3 valve with a tank (open circuit)?

nodes.prompt: Which supply priority best matches your system: lowest initial cost, higher efficiency, peak-flow support (accumulator), or redundant/staged supply (dual pumps)?

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please choose one: lowest cost, higher efficiency, peak-flow support (accumulator), or redundant/staged supply (dual pumps).

stage2.goal: Collect only sizing inputs needed for component selection after a skeleton is selected.

globalQuestions.prompt: Enter the maximum operating pressure P_max (e.g., 210 bar).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the maximum operating pressure with unit (e.g., 210 bar).

globalQuestions.prompt: Enter the rated flow rate Q_rated (e.g., 25 L/min).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the rated flow rate with unit (e.g., 25 L/min).

globalQuestions.prompt: Specify the hydraulic fluid (e.g., HLP 46 or ISO VG 46).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please specify the hydraulic fluid grade (e.g., HLP 46).

cylinder.prompt: Enter the target load as force or mass (e.g., 15 kN or 1.2 t).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide a load value as force or mass (e.g., 15 kN or 1.2 t).

cylinder.prompt: Enter the cylinder stroke length (e.g., 0.50 m).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the stroke length with unit (e.g., 0.50 m).
Please provide the torque with unit (e.g., 120 Nm).

motor.prompt: Enter the target rotational speed (e.g., 1500 rpm).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the rotational speed with unit (e.g., 1500 rpm).

questions.prompt: Enter the required tank volume in L (e.g., 80 L).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the required tank volume with unit (e.g., 80 L).

questions.prompt: Enter the maximum tank level in mm (e.g., 800 mm).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the maximum tank level with unit (e.g., 0.80 m).

questions.prompt: Enter the minimum tank level in mm (e.g., 200 mm).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the minimum tank level with unit (e.g., 0.20 m).

questions.prompt: Enter the pressure protection setpoint in bar (e.g., 180 bar).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the pressure protection setpoint with unit (e.g., 180 bar).
